latin: Gladiator, post caedem hostium, gladium in harenam iecit et ad turbam spectantem clamavit: 'nonne delectamini?'

questions.prompt: What did the gladiator do after killing his enemies?
questions.target: Threw his sword into the sand
choices: Threw his sword into the sand

questions.prompt: What did he shout at the crowd?

translation: The gladiator, after the slaughter of his enemies, threw his sword into the sand and shouted to the watching crowd: 'Are you not entertained?'
